name: Select ROIs
description: Selects regions of interest (ROIs) in the imaging data.
author: Daniel Zanelli

parameters.name: input_video
parameters.label: Input video
parameters.description: Video file on which the ROIs will be drawn

parameters.name: roi_type
parameters.label: ROI type
parameters.description: Geometric shape of the regions of interest

parameters.name: output_dir
parameters.label: Output folder
parameters.description: Folder where the ROI files will be saved

outputs.roi_zip: Path to the ZIP file with the selected ROIs
